pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven compiler release target from Java 11 to Java 17 to enforce compilation against the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 11 APIs, potentially missing incompatibilities with Java 17 or failing to utilize Java 17 features if required by dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM version from 2.7.5.Final to 2.15.3.Final to align with the Java 17 migration and access newer framework features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Quarkus versions may not fully support Java 17 or may have known incompatibilities; upgrading ensures runtime stability and access to bug fixes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Surefire plugin version from 3.0.0-M5 to 3.0.0-M7 to ensure test execution compatibility with the new build environment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions might have issues running tests on newer JDKs or with newer Quarkus versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Agroal connection pool dependency required for database connectivity in the upgraded Quarkus version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime failure if database connections are attempted without the connection pool implementation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the PostgreSQL JDBC driver dependency to enable database connectivity.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime failure when attempting to connect to a PostgreSQL database without the driver.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Flyway dependency for database migration management.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime failure if the application expects Flyway to manage schema migrations but the dependency is missing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the YAML configuration dependency to support YAML-based configuration files.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime failure if the application configuration is provided in YAML format but the parser is missing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Hibernate ORM REST Data Panache dependency for simplified REST resource creation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compile or runtime error if code uses Panache REST resources but the dependency is missing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the RESTEasy JSON-B dependency for JSON serialization/deserialization.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime error if REST endpoints return/accept JSON but the JSON-B provider is not on the classpath.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the SmallRye JWT dependency for JWT authentication support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime failure if security filters expect JWT processing but the extension is missing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the SmallRye OpenAPI dependency for API documentation generation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime failure if the application expects OpenAPI endpoints to be available.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Lombok dependency for boilerplate code reduction.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error if source code uses Lombok annotations but the processor is not available.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Hibernate Validator dependency for bean validation support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime error if validation annotations are used but the validator is not present.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Hibernate ORM Panache dependency for simplified data access.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compile or runtime error if code uses Panache entities but the dependency is missing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Quarkus Test Common dependency for testing utilities.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error if test code imports Quarkus test utilities that are not available.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Testcontainers JDBC dependency for integration testing with databases.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime error in tests if Testcontainers JDBC utilities are used but not present.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Testcontainers PostgreSQL dependency for integration testing with PostgreSQL.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime error in tests if PostgreSQL containers are started but the module is missing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Source Plugin configuration to attach source jars during deployment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Missing source artifacts in the repository, which is often required for library distribution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Javadoc Plugin configuration to attach javadoc jars during deployment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Missing javadoc artifacts in the repository, which is often required for library distribution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Nexus Staging Maven Plugin for deploying to Maven Central.
pom.xml.why_exists: Deployment to Maven Central will fail without the staging plugin configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven GPG Plugin for signing artifacts during deployment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Deployment to Maven Central will fail if artifacts are not signed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update project metadata including groupId, artifactId, version, name, description, and URL to reflect the new project identity.
Add license information to the POM for legal compliance in distribution.
Add developer information to the POM.
Add distribution management configuration for deploying to OSSRH.
Add SCM configuration for source code management links.

src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.general_idea: Update the hardcoded GroupId in the index.html to reflect the actual project organization.
